data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed). However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence of the claim status being tracked or transitioned through these states. The linked use case mentions the need for this workflow, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, it indicates a gap in the required functionality.
gaps: No evidence of claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add claim status validation evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the claim status workflow.
